goal: Make the real-adapter CUDA handoff state that local v0 closeout requires accepted M6 GO review docs to be present in the same release workstation checkout before running bundle closeout.
head: aaac0f5
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update generated CUDA handoff local-closeout prerequisite text/contract, focused tests, current NOT_GO regenerated artifacts, and LLM working context only.
required_commands: rg -n -- "local_closeout_requires_m6_review_docs_go|same release workstation checkout|m6_review_docs_not_current|docs/reviews/M6|GO_V0_RELEASE_CLOSEOUT|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint" scripts/build_real_adapter_handoff.py tests/scripts/test_build_real_adapter_handoff.py artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_handoff.json artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_handoff.md artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_handoff.sh docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
required_evidence: Generated CUDA handoff JSON includes a local closeout prerequisite requiring accepted M6 GO review docs in the same release checkout.
Generated markdown and shell tell operators that copying the metadata-bearing archive is insufficient unless docs/reviews/M6 GO approval is present in the local release checkout.
Focused handoff tests cover the M6 review-doc prerequisite in JSON/Markdown/Shell.
Current v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker.
No release GO is claimed from current local artifacts.
executed_verification_commands: rg -n -- "local_closeout_requires_m6_review_docs_go|same release workstation checkout|m6_review_docs_not_current|docs/reviews/M6|GO_V0_RELEASE_CLOSEOUT|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint" scripts/build_real_adapter_handoff.py tests/scripts/test_build_real_adapter_handoff.py artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_handoff.json artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_handoff.md artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_handoff.sh docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate only clarifies local closeout prerequisites; it does not approve or edit M6 review docs.

phase_notes.plan: Add a same-checkout M6 GO review-doc prerequisite to the generated CUDA handoff local closeout contract.
phase_notes.audit: run_v0_release_closeout_from_bundle.py already fails with m6_review_docs_not_current when local docs/reviews/M6 are not GO, but the handoff currently overemphasizes copying only the metadata-bearing archive.
phase_notes.build: Patch build_real_adapter_handoff.py, focused tests, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, then regenerate current NOT_GO handoff artifacts through recertification.
phase_notes.check: Run focused handoff tests, host-access current NOT_GO recertification, JSON validation, search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this closeout-prerequisite clarification phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Generated CUDA handoff local closeout M6 review-doc prerequisite, focused handoff tests, regenerated current NOT_GO handoff artifacts, LLM context/working state, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
